# CLI reference

Everything ttd can do from the command line. Run `ttd <command> --help` for the
same information in your terminal.

```console
ttd [COMMAND]
```

Running bare `ttd` with no command launches [the TUI](../../guides/the-tui.md).

## Global options

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `--version`, `-V` | Print the ttd version. |
| `--install-completion` | Install shell completion (bash, zsh, or fish auto-detected). |
| `--help`, `-h` | Show help for any command. |

## Commands

| Command | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [`client`](client.md) | Manage clients. |
| [`project`](project.md) | Manage projects. |
| [`entry`](entry.md) | List and edit time entries. |
| [`start` · `stop` · `status` · `cancel`](timer.md) | Start, inspect, stop, or discard the live timer. |
| [`log`](log.md) | Log completed work from a natural-language time spec. |
| [`report`](report.md) | Summaries by day, week, month, or range. |
| [`invoice`](invoice.md) | Create and manage invoices. |
| [`tax`](tax.md) | Track tax set-aside and IRS estimated-tax payments. |
| [`config`](config.md) | Read and write configuration. |
| [`db`](db.md) | Database utilities. |
| [`export`](export.md) | Export entries (csv, json, xlsx, or Apple Numbers). |
| [`import`](import.md) | Import entries; matches by uid then content, never touches invoiced entries. |
